description:
In apply2, the higher-order parameter f is passed a statically-known callee (add1 or double) at each callsite. Despite this, the spec for apply2 shows f typed as any rather than a narrowed function type or closure descriptor.

The callsite narrows the arg types flowing into apply2, but the Var for the function param itself remains any — the spec key captures concrete arg Descrs for data params but not for the function param.

Affects: apply2 fixture. Likely related to how closure/function-typed vars are handled in the spec lattice.
title: apply2: function param typed as any despite static callee resolution
